channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Flipkart terminates delivery agent after woman alleges sexual misconduct in Bengaluru incident
item.description: A 22-year-old Flipkart delivery agent was arrested after a woman in Bengaluru alleged that he forcibly entered her apartment, exposed himself, and violated her privacy. Police registered a case under ...

item.title: Nigeria's Oil Output Surpasses OPEC Quota, Hits Six-Year High
item.description: Nigeria has again surpassed its OPEC-mandated production ceiling for the second consecutive month, with June crude oil output soaring to an average of 1.56 million barrels per day (mbpd). This product...

item.title: Jannik Sinner Defends Wimbledon Title with Dominant Four-Set Victory Over Alexander Zverev
item.description: Jannik Sinner successfully defended his Wimbledon title with a hard-fought four-set victory over Alexander Zverev in the 2026 final. The world No. 1, who had previously lost the first set to Zverev, s...

item.title: Lindsey Graham Dies at 71 from Aortic Dissection, Medical Examiner Reports
item.description: The article details the sudden death of U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham, who passed away on July 11, 2026, at the age of 71 from a brief and sudden illness. Emergency dispatch audio reviewed by Fox News D...

item.title: Toronto Man Arrested After Shootout and Rideshare Theft with Passenger Inside
item.description: A 25-year-old man from Brampton was arrested after a chaotic incident on Polson Street and Cherry Street in Toronto. Police responded to gunfire around 3:30 a.m. and reported an exchange of fire betwe...

item.title: Andrew Upton Discusses His Debut Novel 'Krank Fuss', a Fable Inspired by War and Farm Life
item.description: Australian playwright, producer and director Andrew Upton has released his debut novel, 'Krank Fuss', an allegorical fable reminiscent of Animal Farm. The story centres on a disfigured chicken named K...

item.title: NBI Director Asks for Earlier Testimony in VP Sara Impeachment Trial
item.description: National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) Director Melvin Matibag has requested the House prosecution panel to allow him to testify earlier in the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. This c...

item.title: Lindsey Graham's foreign policy legacy and impact on US global strategy
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, a prominent Republican from South Carolina, passed away at 71, leaving a significant void in American foreign policy. Known for his deep understanding of international affairs, Gr...

item.title: ANC's 2026 LGE strategy targets DA dominance in Western Cape municipalities
item.description: The ANC is intensifying its campaign for the November 4, 2026 Local Government Elections, focusing on five key municipalities in the Western Cape to challenge the DA's control. ANC Western Cape Provin...

item.title: Memorial Prom Night Honors Brave Cancer Warriors
item.description: The article recounts how young cancer patients, inspired by the late Creashy Maart, celebrated a special prom night organized by the Kids-Can Foundation. Creashy, who passed away at 19 after battling ...

item.title: Fatal shooting at Toronto salsa festival leaves two dead, multiple injured
item.description: A tragic shooting during Toronto's Salsa on St. Clair festival left two men dead and four others hospitalized with gunshot wounds, according to police. The incident occurred shortly after 8 p.m. on Sa...

item.title: Top 20% of Canadian Earners Pay Majority of Taxes, Study Finds
item.description: A new report from the Fraser Institute reveals that the top 20% of Canadian income-earning families contribute over 65% of personal income taxes and 58% of total taxes, despite earning 49.5% of the co...

item.title: North Carolina Senate Race Faces Financial and Strategic Challenges
item.description: The North Carolina Senate race between Democratic incumbent Roy Cooper and Republican nominee Michael Whatley highlights stark disparities in campaign funding and national party support. Cooper, a for...

item.title: Young Aussie Hewitt falls short in Wimbledon boys' final
item.description: Cruz Hewitt, the promising Australian tennis prodigy, suffered a disappointing defeat in the Wimbledon boys' final, marking the end of an exciting tournament for young players. The match, held on July...

item.title: Police Arraign Fake Council DG, Summon Key Witnesses for Trial
item.description: The police are set to arraignment Adeniyi Adeyemi, who claims to be the Director-General of a non-existent council, at the Federal High Court in Abuja. The case involves eight counts of forgery and im...

item.title: Tragic incident in Tamil Nadu: Man kills children and himself after family strife
item.description: A 40-year-old man in Tamil Nadu electrocuted his two children aged 14 and 12 before taking his own life, following a period of depression after his wife left the family six months ago. The incident oc...

item.title: Senator Mitch McConnell Updates on Health After Hospitalization and Pneumonia Diagnosis
item.description: Senator Mitch McConnell has provided an update on his health following a recent hospitalization after a fall and a subsequent diagnosis of mild pneumonia. In an email sent to his constituents in Kentu...

item.title: QC Jail Preparing to Receive Senator Rodante Marcoleta
item.description: The Bureau of Jail Management and Penology (BJMP) confirmed that the New Quezon City Jail in Payatas is fully prepared and medically equipped to receive Senator Rodante Marcoleta, who is currently bei...

item.title: New Study Reveals How the Brain Rewires for Multitasking
item.description: A recent study published in the Journal of Cognitive Neuroscience sheds light on how the human brain adapts to multitasking by reorganizing neural pathways. Researchers at Georgetown University Medica...

item.title: Mad Cool Festival 2026 Concludes with Highlight Performances by Pulp, Matt Berninger, and David Byrne
item.description: The fourth day of the Mad Cool 2026 music festival in Madrid showcased standout performances from a diverse lineup, including Pulp, Matt Berninger, David Byrne, and TTSSFU. The event, celebrating its ...
